# Time Series Forecasting

> Course materials for Time Series Forecasting at ITESO — covering decomposition, ETS, ARIMA, regression, dynamic regression, Prophet, and hierarchical forecasting using R and the tidyverts ecosystem.

## Pages

- [index](https://pbenavidesh.github.io/narsil/index.llms.md)
- [Correlation, dependence, and time series pitfalls](https://pbenavidesh.github.io/narsil/docs/more/stats/correlation.llms.md)
- [Expectation, variance, and covariance: measuring uncertainty](https://pbenavidesh.github.io/narsil/docs/more/stats/expectation_variance_cov.llms.md)
- [Random variables: uncertainty as an object](https://pbenavidesh.github.io/narsil/docs/more/stats/random_variables.llms.md)
- [tsibble: thinking in keys and time](https://pbenavidesh.github.io/narsil/docs/more/r-tools/tsibble.llms.md)
- [Pipes and the tidyverse mental model](https://pbenavidesh.github.io/narsil/docs/more/r-tools/pipes_tidyverse.llms.md)
